data.body: DONE — all 4 slices landed + docs finalized. Commits on main: 2f8faa9d (slice 1 ticket_clarity), 8b4d797f (slice 2 reconciler.*), 287788df (slice 3 jira.*), 48783029 (slice 4 llm.*), 25da9388 (docs/config.md). reconciler.*/jira.*/llm.* + ticket_clarity all now consume their config-FILE layer through the single load_config entry point (llm via the reserved-section read_reserved_section path, NOT core Config). Each slice: exhaustive PARAMETERS x LOCATIONS tests (precedence CLI>env>project>user>default + portability), subagent review clean, full offline suite green (final 2049), ruff clean. Slice 3 ALSO validated LIVE against the Jira DIG project (dry-run reconcile + full link round-trip passed; the one xfail is a pre-existing ACLI-version primitive limitation). Preserved throughout: fail-closed verify gate, id-guard value-flip/fail-CLOSED/loud bypass warning/legacy flat rebar_id_guard_mode key, stdlib-only core. One discovered follow-up: 3b92 (bridge_fsck out-of-scope 10th JIRA_* site). AC met; closing.
